data.body: EDITOR REMEDIATION COMPLETE (commits 19d3985d, 495dd7c8, fab2c3e0). (1) Faithful E2E tier tests/e2e drives REAL bpmn-io libs (bpmn-moddle+bpmn-auto-layout, Node, self-skipping) — reproduced+fixed the @-id branch-arm Save bug. (2) Front-end rebuilt: vendored bundle (bpmn-js+properties-panel+auto-layout) served locally, no CDN; auto-layout fixes legibility, properties panel enables view/edit of rebar config. (3) Packaging: wheel ships dist (1.3MB), excludes node_modules. (4) Docs: docs/workflow-editor.md + README + architecture, client-vs-developer audience kept. NOTE: concurrent bg job editing same tree (grounding/, pyproject extras) — staged only my hunks; my editor.py edit was reverted once by it and re-applied+committed. Nested constructs render collapsed (drill-down). READY for Joe's in-browser review.
